build.beforeDevCommand: npm run build:all && npm run dev

security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; worker-src 'self' blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; font-src 'self' data: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; frame-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self';
